description: Composition Red round neck T-shirt made of 100% cotton, has short sleeves, ribbed neckline and has distressed print on the chest with flock detailing Fitting Fitted Wash care Machine wash separately in cold water using a mild detergent Do not bleach Hang dry in shade Warm iron; do not iron on print or embroidery The flock detailing on the distressed print on the chest adds rugged styling to this T-shirt from basics, while the cotton fabric keeps you feeling comfortable all day. Team it with jeans, tees and sneakers. Model statistics Product is a size M on a model of height 5'11' and shoulders 17.5"
